plan_id.description: The Health Insurance and Oversight System unique identifier for the plan

payer_id.description: A numeric identifier for the payer that manages the plan

payer_name.description: The name of the payer that manages the plan

plan_marketing_name.description: The name that the plan goes by in marketing materials

plan_type.description: The type of healthcare plan (e.g. HMO, PPO)

summary_url.description: A URL that contains summary information about the plan

marketing_url.description: A URL that contains marketing information about the plan
